name: CyberSecEval Benchmark
description: Meta's CyberSecEval Benchmark — evaluation suite for LLM cybersecurity risks. Covers insecure code generation, cyberattack helpfulness, prompt injection, and other dimensions.
relationToCloudSecurity: Used to evaluate models intended for deployment in cloud environments.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety benchmark targeting cybersecurity-specific risks.
